title: cirsium × haynaldii
intro: Cirsium × haynaldii, also known as the Haynald's thistle or Hungarian thistle, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between Cirsium pannonicum and Cirsium heterophyllum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Cirsium × haynaldii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological problems. Cirsium × haynaldii is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice or salve to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
